heading: Today
text: Clouds through Quebec, otherwise partly sunny.  Showers or thunderstorms developing in the St. Lawrence Valley midday, spreading east through Quebec, then south to the Adirondacks and Rt. 4 late in the day, some with gusty winds and heavy rain.  Very warm to hot, and increasingly humid.  Highs in the 80s, a few warmer valleys approaching 90.  Light winds, mainly southwest less than 10 mph.

heading: Tonight
text: A good chance of showers or thunderstorms north, scattered south, some with gusty winds and heavy rain.  Mild and muggy.  Lows in the 60s.  Winds southwest 10 to 15 mph.

heading: Friday
text: Clouds breaking for periods of sun.  A few morning showers north.  Localized showers and thunderstorms south.  Highs in the upper 70s and 80s.  Winds light, becoming north near 10 mph.
